message:
feat: add comprehensive OpenCode AI support

Complete OpenCode integration based on https://opencode.ai/docs/config:

Agent System:
- Add OpenCodeAgent to supported agents list
- Mount ~/.config/opencode/ directory automatically
- Handle standard config file mounting (no special handling needed)

Environment Variables:
- OPENCODE_API_KEY - Authentication
- OPENCODE_CONFIG - Custom config file path
- OPENCODE_CONFIG_DIR - Custom config directory
- Added to default environment variable passthrough

Container Integration:
- Mount OpenCode config directory if it exists
- Proper container path mapping for vscode user
- Follows same patterns as other AI agents

Testing:
- Add comprehensive OpenCodeAgent test
- Verify config directory mounting
- Test environment variable handling
- Validate agent registration

This enables full OpenCode AI CLI functionality with proper
configuration and credential management in packnplay containers.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
